Patch Set 6:

I am having problems with this patch, it leads to relatively high frequency of crashes in lu_object_put in racer that looks like use after free. Removing this patch made the crashes go away.

here are some examples (also have crashdumps):

Patch Set 6:

(1 comment)

Despite the problems that this patch might expose in racer, my thought is that it is fixing a real problem that Stephane has seen in the field, while the racer issue seems very unlikely to be hit under normal usage, so it is a net improvement over the current code.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review+2

I am landing this since we need it on b2_12 and there's a clear path forward in https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/34071/
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as c6f3d533542b9462b5b8df95183d80321d4d9c34 by Oleg Drokin

commit.subject: LU-12037 mdt: add option for cross-MDT rename
commit.message:
LU-12037 mdt: add option for cross-MDT rename

Add option mdt.mdt_remote_rename, if it's not set (it's set by
default), do cross-MDT rename as cp, this is used for debug or
user want to move inode in rename.

Add sanity test_24z.

Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia0d122f1716f17078b375f770a193347a6e50708
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/34410
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
